protocol.primary_outcome_question: How smooth and glowy did your skin look this morning? (0=not at all, 10=very smooth and glowy)
protocol.screening: Check for concurrent actives and sensitive-skin concerns.
protocol.warnings: Evidence is weak and mixed. The trial is exploratory and should stay private.

user_message: PitGPT may generate the protocol, but it should clearly mark the evidence as weak and mixed.
notes: Should not upgrade observational plus anecdotal evidence.
